stemHtml: The flight crew of an aircraft receives a departure clearance. Due to bad weather forecasted on the cleared route, the pilot-in-command would prefer a different route. What is the appropriate course of action by the ATC?

options.a: Approve if the new flight plan was refiled.
options.b: Suggest to cancel the flight if it is not practical.
options.c: Issue an amended clearance with a new route.
options.d: Advice the flight crew to continue as cleared and contact them if they encounter any issues en-route.
